calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on a regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Petitioners, Fernando Manuel Rico-Escobar present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the decree changing petitioner's name to: Manuel Fernando Escobar.
Decree signed in open court.
